visuals.title: Mechanism vs Policy Separation
visuals.description: Diagram illustrating how mechanism and policy are separated in OS design, with scheduling as an example

diagrams.title: Design Goals and Implementation
steps: Define user goals (convenience, reliability, safety, speed)
Separate mechanisms from policies for flexibility
Choose implementation language (C/C++ for portability, assembly for hardware-specific parts)
Design OS structure (monolithic, layered, microkernel, modular)
diagrams.notes: No unique solution exists. Different operating systems make different tradeoffs between user goals and system goals.
